jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description:
Data Analyst – Role Description & Qualifications
Role Overview
The Data Analyst is responsible for transforming raw data into meaningful insights that support business decisions and operational efficiency. This role focuses on data collection, analysis, reporting, and visualization to identify trends, measure performance, and uncover opportunities for improvement. The Data Analyst works closely with stakeholders across departments to ensure data-driven strategies align with organizational goals.
Key Responsibilities
• Collect, process, and analyze data from multiple internal and external sources.
• Validate, clean, and structure datasets to ensure accuracy and consistency.
• Develop reports, dashboards, and visualizations to communicate insights effectively.
• Analyze trends, patterns, and key performance indicators to support decision-making.
• Collaborate with business teams to understand analytical requirements and objectives.
• Support ad hoc analysis requests and present findings to stakeholders.
• Assist in defining data standards, metrics, and documentation practices.
• Identify data quality issues and recommend corrective actions.
• Contribute to automation and optimization of data analysis and reporting processes.
• Stay informed about analytical tools, techniques, and best practices.
Qualifications and Requirements
• Bachelor’s degree in Data Analytics, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics, or a related field.
• Strong understanding of data analysis techniques, statistical concepts, and data structures.
• Experience working with datasets, databases, and reporting tools.
• Proficiency in spreadsheets and data visualization platforms; familiarity with query languages or analytical scripting is a plus.
• Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
• High attention to detail and commitment to data accuracy.
• Ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights.
• Strong communication and collaboration skills.
• Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines effectively.
• Experience gained through professional roles, academic projects, or internships is advantageous.
Summary
The Data Analyst plays a vital role in enabling data-driven decision-making by delivering accurate analysis and actionable insights. This position offers opportunities to work with diverse datasets, collaborate across teams, and contribute directly to strategic and operational improvements within the organization.

Show more

Show less

Entry level

Employment type

Industries

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description:
Company Description
VCMAX is a data-driven organization focused on leveraging analytics and insights to support informed business decisions and strategic growth. The company values precision, transparency, and innovation in how data is collected, interpreted, and communicated. Team members collaborate across functions to build scalable solutions that improve performance and operational efficiency. VCMAX offers opportunities to work with diverse datasets, modern analytics tools, and cross-functional stakeholders. The work environment encourages continuous learning, professional development, and ownership of impactful projects.
Role Description
The Data Analyst role at VCMAX is a full-time, on-site position based in New York, NY. The Data Analyst will collect, clean, and validate data from multiple sources, ensuring accuracy and consistency for reporting and analysis. Daily responsibilities include building and maintaining dashboards, performing exploratory and statistical analysis, and developing data models to support forecasting and decision-making. The role involves preparing clear reports, visualizations, and presentations for business stakeholders, translating complex findings into practical recommendations. The Data Analyst will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to identify data needs, optimize processes, and support strategic initiatives with timely, actionable insights.
Qualifications

Strong Analytical Skills and Data Analytics capabilities to interpret complex datasets and generate insights.
Proficiency in Statistics and Data Modeling to support forecasting, trend analysis, and scenario evaluation.
Effective Communication skills to present findings clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Experience with data tools and languages such as SQL, Excel, and one or more analytics or BI platforms (e.g., Python/R, Tableau, Power BI).
Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Business Analytics, or a related field.
Strong attention to detail, problem-solving skills, and the ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Experience working with large datasets and relational databases; familiarity with data governance and best practices is a plus.
Prior experience in an analytics, business intelligence, or similar role is preferred but candidates with strong foundational skills are encouraged to apply.

Show more

Show less

Seniority level

Entry level

Employment type

Full-time

Job function

Information Technology

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description:
About The Company

FocusKPI is a leading provider of innovative marketing solutions, dedicated to empowering organizations with data-driven insights and strategies. Our company specializes in delivering cutting-edge SaaS platforms that enable clients to optimize their marketing efforts, improve customer engagement, and achieve measurable business growth. With a commitment to excellence and a passion for technological advancement, FocusKPI fosters an environment of continuous innovation, collaboration, and professional development. Our diverse team of experts works tirelessly to deliver value to our clients through tailored solutions that meet the evolving demands of the digital marketing landscape.

About The Role

We are seeking a highly skilled Marketing Operations Analyst to join our client's high-tech SaaS company as part of the Marketing Operations & Technology team. This role is pivotal in shaping the company's marketing data strategy, ensuring data integrity, and enabling effective audience segmentation and targeting. The ideal candidate will possess a strong technical background, particularly in SQL and data management, and will be comfortable working with large, complex data sets in a fast-paced environment. As a hands-on technical role, the Marketing Operations Analyst will be responsible for maintaining data governance standards, supporting compliance with privacy regulations such as GDPR and CCPA, and collaborating across teams to enhance data usability and accessibility. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work at the intersection of marketing technology and data analytics, contributing directly to strategic marketing initiatives and the company's overall success.

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Marketing, or a related field.
Proven experience in marketing operations, data analysis, or a similar role within a SaaS or high-tech environment.
Strong proficiency in SQL, with the ability to write complex queries to extract and manipulate data.
Experience working with Customer Data Platforms (CDPs) and marketing automation tools.
Knowledge of data governance principles and experience ensuring data quality and compliance.
Understanding of privacy regulations such as GDPR and CCPA, and experience implementing compliant data practices.
Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities.
Strong communication skills, capable of translating technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

Responsibilities

Develop and implement audience segmentation strategies utilizing advanced SQL queries and data manipulation techniques to support targeted marketing campaigns.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand data requirements and translate them into technical solutions that enhance marketing efforts.
Maintain and improve data governance standards across systems, ensuring data accuracy, consistency, and security.
Monitor and analyze data flow processes, identifying areas for improvement and developing solutions to optimize data usability.
Ensure compliance with privacy regulations such as GDPR and CCPA by implementing and auditing data handling practices.
Build and activate customer audiences through the company’s Customer Data Platform (CDP), supporting personalized marketing initiatives.
Work closely with data engineering and marketing teams to integrate new data sources and improve data pipelines.
Document data processes, governance policies, and best practices to ensure organizational knowledge sharing and compliance.
Stay updated with the latest trends and advancements in marketing technology, data management, and privacy regulations.

Benefits

Our client offers a competitive compensation package aligned with industry standards, including comprehensive health insurance, retirement plans, and paid time off. Employees have access to ongoing professional development opportunities, including training programs, certifications, and conferences. The company promotes a flexible work environment with options for remote work, fostering a healthy work-life balance. Additional perks include collaborative team events, wellness programs, and a supportive organizational culture that values innovation and diversity. Joining this organization provides an excellent platform for career growth within a dynamic and forward-thinking high-tech SaaS company.

Equal Opportunity

FocusKPI and its clients are committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected status. We believe that diverse teams drive innovation and excellence, and we welcome applicants from all backgrounds to apply.

Employment type

Job function

Analyst

Industries

Technology, Information and Media

jobs.title: Junior Data Analyst
jobs.description:
Role Description
This role is for a Junior Data Analyst responsible for supporting data-driven decision-making through data collection, analysis, validation, and reporting. In this position, you will assist in transforming raw data into meaningful insights that support business operations, performance monitoring, and strategic initiatives.
As a Junior Data Analyst, you will work with datasets from multiple sources, helping to clean, organize, and prepare data for analysis. You will support senior analysts or cross-functional teams by performing structured analyses, identifying basic trends and patterns, and ensuring data accuracy and consistency.
Key responsibilities include maintaining datasets, performing data validation checks, and assisting with routine analytical tasks. You will help generate reports, dashboards, and summaries that communicate findings clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
You will collaborate with teams across departments to understand data requirements, support reporting needs, and contribute to ongoing analytics projects. This role provides exposure to real-world data workflows, business metrics, and analytical processes, making it ideal for individuals looking to develop foundational data analysis skills.
The Junior Data Analyst role requires strong attention to detail, logical thinking, and a willingness to learn. You will be expected to follow data standards, document assumptions, and ensure that outputs are accurate, timely, and aligned with business objectives.
Clear communication skills are important, as you will assist in explaining data findings and supporting informed decision-making. By providing reliable analytical support, the Junior Data Analyst plays an important role in enabling data-driven insights and continuous improvement.
Key Responsibilities
Collect, clean, and organize data from multiple sources
Perform basic data analysis to identify trends and patterns
Validate data accuracy and consistency
Maintain and update datasets and data documentation
Assist in creating reports, dashboards, and summaries
Support ad-hoc data requests and routine analytical tasks
Collaborate with analysts and stakeholders on data requirements
Document methodologies, assumptions, and data sources
Support performance tracking and operational reporting
Follow data quality and governance standards

Qualifications
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
High attention to detail and data accuracy
Ability to work with structured datasets
Proficiency with spreadsheets and basic analysis tools
Basic understanding of data analysis concepts and metrics
Ability to create clear reports and summaries
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines
Willingness to learn and develop analytical skills
Educational background in Data Analytics, Statistics, Business, Economics, Information Systems, or a related field is preferred 

Show more

Show less

Seniority level

Entry level

Employment type

Part-time

Job function

Information Technology

Industries

Information Services
